documentation.text:
@dev Contract module which provides a basic access control mechanism, where
 there is an account (an owner) that can be granted exclusive access to
 specific functions.
 By default, the owner account will be the one that deploys the contract. This
 can later be changed with {transferOwnership}.
 This module is used through inheritance. It will make available the modifier
 `onlyOwner`, which can be applied to your functions to restrict their use to
 the owner.
@dev Initializes the contract setting the deployer as the initial owner.
@dev Throws if called by any account other than the owner.
@dev Returns the address of the current owner.

documentation.text: @dev Throws if the sender is not the owner.

@dev Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call
 `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner.
 NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner,
 thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

@dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).
 Can only be called by the current owner.

@dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).
 Internal function without access restriction.

@dev Contract module which allows children to implement an emergency stop
 mechanism that can be triggered by an authorized account.
 This module is used through inheritance. It will make available the
 modifiers `whenNotPaused` and `whenPaused`, which can be applied to
 the functions of your contract. Note that they will not be pausable by
 simply including this module, only once the modifiers are put in place.
@dev Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.
@dev Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.
@dev Initializes the contract in unpaused state.
@dev Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.
@dev Throws if the contract is paused.
@dev Throws if the contract is not paused.

@dev Contract module that helps prevent reentrant calls to a function.
 Inheriting from `ReentrancyGuard` will make the {nonReentrant} modifier
 available, which can be applied to functions to make sure there are no nested
 (reentrant) calls to them.
 Note that because there is a single `nonReentrant` guard, functions marked as
 `nonReentrant` may not call one another. This can be worked around by making
 those functions `private`, and then adding `external` `nonReentrant` entry
 points to them.
 TIP: If you would like to learn more about reentrancy and alternative ways
 to protect against it, check out our blog post
 https://blog.openzeppelin.com/reentrancy-after-istanbul/[Reentrancy After Istanbul].

@dev Prevents a contract from calling itself, directly or indirectly.
 Calling a `nonReentrant` function from another `nonReentrant`
 function is not supported. It is possible to prevent this from happening
 by making the `nonReentrant` function external, and making it call a
 `private` function that does the actual work.

@dev Returns true if the reentrancy guard is currently set to "entered", which indicates there is a
 `nonReentrant` function in the call stack.

@dev Provides information about the current execution context, including the
 sender of the transaction and its data. While these are generally available
 via msg.sender and msg.data, they should not be accessed in such a direct
 manner, since when dealing with meta-transactions the account sending and
 paying for execution may not be the actual sender (as far as an application
 is concerned).
 This contract is only required for intermediate, library-like contracts.

@title CrowdfundingMarketplace
 @dev A decentralized crowdfunding platform with campaign management and commission system

@title MilestoneManager
 @dev Layered milestone contract that references campaign IDs from the existing
      CrowdfundingMarketplace without touching its storage.  Supports:
       - Milestone creation by campaign creator (opt-in)
       - Per-milestone contributions (alongside existing contributeToCampaign)
       - Oracle approval path (trusted off-chain verifier)
       - DAO voting fallback (proportional to milestone contribution amount)
       - Pull-pattern fund release with ReentrancyGuard
@dev Address of the trusted oracle signer
@dev campaignId  => milestoneId => Milestone
@dev campaignId  => milestone count (used as next ID)
@dev campaignId  => creator address (opt-in registration)
@dev campaignId  => milestoneId => contributor => amount
@dev campaignId  => milestoneId => voter => Vote
@dev Voting quorum: minimum ETH-weight participation rate (basis points, e.g. 3000 = 30%)
@dev Approval threshold: minimum ETH-weight FOR rate among votes (basis points, e.g. 5100 = 51%)
@dev Voting window in seconds after milestone deadline or evidence submission

@notice Rotate oracle address (owner only).
 @param _newOracle New trusted oracle signer address.
@notice Update DAO voting parameters (owner only).

milestone contract that references campaign IDs from the existing      CrowdfundingMarketplace without touching its storage.  Supports:       - Milestone creation by campaign creator (opt-in)       - Per-milestone contributions (alongside existing contributeToCampaign)       - Oracle approval path (trusted off-chain verifier)       - DAO voting fallback (proportional to milestone contribution amount)       - Pull-pattern fund release with ReentrancyGuard","kind":"dev","methods":{"contributeToMilestone(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"_campaignId":"Campaign ID.","_milestoneId":"Milestone ID."}},"createMilestone(uint256,string,string,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"_campaignId":"Campaign ID (must be registered).","_description":"Description of deliverable.","_duration":"Seconds from now until contribution deadline.","_targetAmount":"ETH (wei) funding target for this milestone.","_title":"Human-readable title."}},"getCampaignMilestones(uint256)":{"details":"Returns all milestones for a campaign as an array"},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"registerCampaign(uint256)":{"params":{"_campaignId":"ID of the campaign in CrowdfundingMarketplace."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setOracleAddress(address)":{"params":{"_newOracle":"New trusted oracle signer address."}},"submitMilestoneEvidence(uint256,uint256,string,string)":{"params":{"_campaignId":"Campaign ID.","_evidenceIpfsHash":"IPFS CID of the evidence package (can be empty if URL provided).","_evidenceUrl":"Plain URL fallback (can be empty if IPFS provided).","_milestoneId":"Milestone ID."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"voteMilestone(uint256,uint256,bool)":{"params":{"_inFavour":"true = approve, false = reject."}}},"stateVariables":{"approvalThresholdBps":{"details":"Approval threshold: minimum ETH-weight FOR rate among votes (basis points, e.g. 5100 = 51%)"},"campaignCreator":{"details":"campaignId  => creator address (opt-in registration)"},"milestoneContributions":{"details":"campaignId  => milestoneId => contributor => amount"},"milestoneCount":{"details":"campaignId  => milestone count (used as next ID)"},"milestones":{"details":"campaignId  => milestoneId => Milestone"},"oracleAddress":{"details":"Address of the trusted oracle signer"},"votes":{"details":"campaignId  => milestoneId => voter => Vote"},"votingQuorumBps":{"details":"Voting quorum: minimum ETH-weight participation rate (basis points, e.g. 3000 = 30%)"},"votingWindowSeconds":{"details":"Voting window in seconds after milestone deadline or evidence submission"}},"title":"MilestoneManager","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"approveMilestoneByOracle(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Oracle approves milestone after off-chain evidence verification."},"claimMilestoneRefund(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Contributor claims a refund when a milestone is rejected."},"contributeToMilestone(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Contribute ETH to a specific milestone.         Does NOT alter existing CrowdfundingMarketplace contributions."},"createMilestone(uint256,string,string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Create a milestone for a registered campaign."},"finalizeVoting(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Anyone can call this to force a DAO resolution once the voting window expires.         Use this when the voting window has passed and the oracle hasn't acted."},"registerCampaign(uint256)":{"notice":"Campaign creator registers their existing campaign for milestone management.
